data.title: Simply Good Foods Gears Up For Q2 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Before the trading session begins on Thursday, April 9, The Simply Good Foods Company (NASDAQ: SFPL) will report its second quarter earnings. Analysts are predicting a quarterly profit of 40 cents per share, a decrease from the 46 cents per share reported in the same period last year. The consensus among analysts for the company's quarterly revenue stands at $344.08 million, a decline from the $359.65 million revenue reported last year. Joe Scalzo took over as the president and CEO on Jan. 20, succeeding Geoff Tanner. The company's stock closed at $14.22 on Monday, showing a 0.4% increase. For more details, analyst ratings can be found on the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: Pony.ai's Singapore AV Deployment Enters By-Invite Rides, Advancing Dual-Engine Strategy
data.description: Pony.ai has recently announced that they have received regulatory approval to proceed with by-invite ride services in Singapore. This development signifies a significant step towards the launch of public-facing services in the country. The approval marks a crucial milestone in Pony.ai's partnership with ComfortDelGro and its strategic plan for expanding international operations. The announcement was made on April 7, 2026, showing the company's progress in Singapore's market.

data.title: Fifteen Years Alongside Europe's Drug Discovery Teams: Viva Biotech Strengthens Continuity from Discovery to Development and Manufacturing
data.description: In Shanghai on April 7, 2026, Viva Biotech announced 15 years of successful partnership with Europe's drug discovery sector, reiterating dedication to the region with a focus on operational consistency, ongoing expansion, and adaptable cooperation. This long-standing commitment underscores Viva Biotech's efforts to foster collaborative efforts in Europe and enhance growth prospects for both parties.
